summary: Completed testing of Attendance System features: Worker check-in/check-out functionality with daily tracking and statistics. All 9 backend API tests passed. All 11 frontend features verified via Playwright.
passed_tests: Workers page - Jelenlét (Attendance) tab is visible and clickable
Attendance tab - Shows today's date (2026. március 25. szerda) and list of workers
Attendance tab - Each worker has 'Belépés' (Check-in) button when not checked in
Attendance check-in - Clicking Belépés shows success toast 'Sikeres bejelentkezés!'
Attendance checked-in state - Shows green border, check-in time badge (11:35 óta), and 'Kilépés' (Check-out) button
Attendance check-out - Clicking Kilépés shows success toast with hours worked 'Sikeres kijelentkezés! Ledolgozott órák: 0'
Attendance checked-out state - Shows blue border, hours worked badge (0 óra), and 'Kijelentkezett' status
Attendance summary - Shows: Dolgozók (5), Bejelentkezve (0-1), Kijelentkezett (2-3), Nem jelentkezett (2-3)
Backend API - GET /api/attendance/today returns today's attendance records
Backend API - GET /api/attendance/today with location filter works
Backend API - POST /api/attendance/check-in creates attendance record
Backend API - POST /api/attendance/check-in fails with 400 when already checked in
Backend API - POST /api/attendance/check-out works for checked-in worker
Backend API - POST /api/attendance/check-out fails with 400 when not checked in
Backend API - GET /api/attendance with filters (location, date) works
Backend API - GET /api/attendance/worker/{worker_id} returns worker's attendance history
Backend API - GET /api/attendance/stats/{worker_id} returns attendance statistics
seed_data_creation: Created test attendance records during testing via check-in/check-out operations. Multiple workers now have attendance records for today (2026-03-25).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 tested Attendance System features. Workers page has 4 tabs: Dolgozók (Workers), Műszakbeosztás (Schedule), Statisztika (Statistics), Jelenlét (Attendance). The Jelenlét tab shows today's attendance with worker cards displaying different states: not checked in (Belépés button), checked in (green border, time badge, Kilépés button), checked out (blue border, hours badge, Kijelentkezett status). Summary section at bottom shows counts for total workers, checked in, checked out, and not checked in. All backend APIs working: /attendance/today, /attendance/check-in, /attendance/check-out, /attendance/worker/{id}, /attendance/stats/{id}.
